Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade Now Influencing Ethereum Mainnet Efficiency and Gas Costs | YES | MED confidence**  
The Pectra upgrade's impact on mainnet has been confirmed as of April 16, 2026, with ETH gas fees surging due to high network activity and shifts in Gwei calculations for smart contracts via new EIPs, potentially affecting transaction costs and ecosystem activity.[3]
